permalink: /llms-full.txt
---
# {{ site.title }} - Full Content

Every post below has a machine-consumable markdown twin at `<post-url>index.md`,
served by GitHub Pages with `Content-Type: text/markdown; charset=utf-8`.

{% for post in site.posts %}
## {{ post.title }}
URL: {{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}
Markdown: {{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}index.md
Date: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
Tags: {{ post.tags | join: ", " }}

{{ post.content }}

---
{% endfor %}
